JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR CT. TRIAL, ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFT. JASMINE M. KARGANILLO; DEFT. LEROY POLAR SWORN AS A WITNESS; AND ON THE RECORD STATED THAT HE HAD THE AUTHORITY TO SETTLE THE CASE. STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED IN DEPT. #1.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POLAR, LEROY D. KARGANILLO, JASMINE M. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1414 KANSAS ST, #1 $7,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,000.00, STAYED UNTIL DEC-05-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT NO EVICTION BEFORE 12/5/94, 5PM. (SEE FILE FOR MORE DETAIL).
